commands: vp pm pack --help # should show help
vp pm pack && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack current package
vp pm pack --out ./dist/package.tgz && rm -rf ./dist # should pack with output file
vp pm pack --pack-destination ./dist && rm -rf ./dist # should pack with destination
vp pm pack --json --pack-gzip-level 9 && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack with gzip compression level
vp pm pack --json && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack with json output
vp pm pack -- --loglevel=warn && rm -rf *.tgz # should support pass through arguments
